title: BEEWAY Swim Vest - Swim Jacket for Kids/Buoyancy Aid for Swimming with Removeable Floats and Safety Strap & Buckle
features: SWIM EASIER AND ENJOY MORE - The Beeway swim vests are specifically designed to help children learn how to swim and assist them in maintaining the correct swimming position. By using the vests, children not only have a great time in the water but also develop confidence, which is beneficial for their overall health and enjoyment of life.

SAFE AND SGS APPROVED - Designed with your child's safety in mind. It includes an additional adjustable strap that secures under the child's crotch, providing a secure fit and enhancing safety. With the double insurance buckle, you can rest assured that accidental loosening or opening is effectively prevented. Additionally, our swim vests are UKCA/CE approved and have passed EN 13138: 2021 + AC: 2022, complying with the applicable essential health and safety requirements of the Personal Protective Equipment Regulation 2016/425.

COMFORTABLE AND PROTECTION - Made from skin-friendly quick-dry neoprene fabric and features soft Lycra binding for ultimate comfort and durability. It not only offers 50+ UV resistance and 100% sun protection on all covered areas, but it also provides thermal protection for colder pools.

ADJUSTABLE BUOYANCY SYSTEM - It features 8 groups of soft, flexible, and easy-to-remove foam floats, with each group containing 3 pieces. This innovative design allows you to tailor the buoyancy level to perfectly match your child's needs and progression in the water. Whether they're just starting to learn or becoming more confident swimmers, you can easily customize the float arrangement for maximum support and comfort.

3 SIZE OPTIONS FOR 1-8 YEARS - When choosing a size, it's crucial to measure the wearer's chest size or weight and follow the provided size guide. If the wearer's chest size or weight exceeds the upper limit indicated on the size chart, it is recommended to select the next size up. （AGE IS FOR REFERENCE ONLY）
